retry_reason: Not a wrapper — no refcount operation is the primary purpose.

judge.reason: The function performs extensive device registration logic: allocation, IDA minor number allocation, device initialization, cdev registration, and sysfs linking. Reference-count operations (device_initialize, put_device on error) are only incidental cleanup steps within much broader business logic. The primary purpose is creation and registration of a bsg device, not reference-count management.
